hero.title: Ibikenewe mu bijanye n'ugushikira amabanki y'abikorera utwabo
hero.lead: IATF ifasha amashirahamwe, imigwi, hamwe n'abantu ku giti cabo guhindura ibikenewe vy'ukuri mu bijanye n'ukworoherezwa kw'amasoko mu migambi ya bose.
support: Ibikorwa vyemewe birasohorwa mw'ishirahamwe rya IATF GitHub munsi y'uruhusha rwa copyleft kandi bigakorwa ku mugaragaro n'umuhinga ajejwe.

header.title: Uburyo bworoshe bw'ugukoresha ubuhinga bwa none bworohereza abantu

paragraphs: Biciye ku rupapuro, umuntu wese arashobora gushikiriza ikibazo c'ubushobozi bwo gushikira IATF. Niba umurwi ushobora kuvyakira, ububiko bwa GitHub bwa bose burugururwa ku bw'ico gikorwa.
Umushinga wose wemejwe uba ufise ahantu hatomoye ku bijanye n'amategeko, ibibazo, ivyandikano, n'ibisohorwa, aho iterambere riyoborwa ku mugaragaro n'umuhinga afise ibanga.

terms.definition: Uburyo bwo kurangura iryo banga be n'ukuntu rishoboka mu vy'ukuri

header.title: Ingene bikora
header.intro: Ico gishushanyo kiguma ari gitoyi kugira ngo abantu bashobore kugikurikirana bitagoranye.

steps.title: Igisabwa kirashikirizwa
paragraphs: Ishirahamwe, umugwi, canke umuntu ku giti ciwe arashobora gutanga icegeranyo gishingiye ku bintu vy'ukuri bikenewe mu bijanye n'ukworoherezwa.
Ibisabwa birashobora gutangurira ku rubuga rwa internet, biciye kuri e-mail kuri contact@iatf.cc, canke biciye kuri Discord.

steps.title: IATF irisuzuma
paragraphs: Turasuzuma ko igikorwa gihuye n'igikorwa, ko gifise akamaro, be n'uko ico gikorwa coba kiri mu mugambi wugururiwe bose.

steps.title: Ububiko bw'amakuru bwa bose burashizweho
paragraphs: Mu gihe umushinga wemerewe, urasohorwa mw'ishirahamwe rya IATF GitHub hakurikijwe uruhusha rwa copyleft.
Ico kibanza c'ububiko kiba icicaro c'ibisohokayandikiro, ibintu vyasohowe, ivyandikano be n'ivyasohotse.

steps.title: Umuhinga mu vy'ubwubatsi ni we ayobora ico gikorwa
paragraphs: Umuhinga mu vy'ubwubatsi ni we ashingwa igikorwa co gushira mu bubiko bw'igikorwa, ivyo bikorwa bigakorwa ku mugaragaro.

header.title: Kurabira hamwe ibikorwa biriko birakorwa canke gutanguza umugambi kanaka

paragraphs: Nukoreshe ico cegeranyo kugira urabe ivyamaze gushikirizwa ku mugaragaro, canke utangure kwinjiza amakuru mu gihe ingorane kanaka ijanye n'ukworoherwa yoba igiye kuba umushinga.
